title: Transactional writes are idempotent and fully audited
statement: Every transactional write (RENACH/RENAINF POST/PATCH) is idempotent: a replay — same natural key (numeroRenach+operation, numeroAit, idProcesso+phase) or same Idempotency-Key header — returns the original result and status without creating a duplicate. Every state transition writes an audit.evento row with the payload and a SHA-256 payload hash, recording situacao_anterior/situacao_nova and the cpf_usuario. No state changes without a corresponding audit record.
rationale: The reference architecture mandates idempotency and full auditability for transactional operations; retries are normal for real clients and must not double-apply penalties, exams, or payments.
